title: Employees
selectProject: Please select a project to view the employee list.
description: Employees are persistent capability carriers. Each employee binds to a role, can be extended with skills, has an independent memory namespace, and is reused in llm_agent nodes of workflows.
empty: No employees in this project yet. Click "Create Employee" to add the first one.
table.name: Name
delete.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete the employee and all skill bindings and execution history. Memory rows (scope=employee in agent_memory) will also be removed.
drawer.editDescription: Modify employee configuration. Name cannot be changed after creation.
drawer.createDescription: Once created, the Name field cannot be modified (used as unique identifier).
form.name.label: Name (Unique Identifier)
form.displayName.label: Display Name (Optional)
form.roleId.label: Role ID
form.roleId.hint: Must match a role registered in roles/<id>/role.yaml.
form.runtimePrefs.label: Runtime Prefs (JSON)
form.config.label: Config (JSON)
form.config.hint: Use field system_prompt_override to override the role default system prompt.
form.skills.label: Extra Skills (one path per line)
form.skills.hint: Appended on top of role base skills; path format same as skills[].path in role manifest.
error.invalidJson.runtimePrefs: Runtime prefs must be valid JSON
noRunsDescription: This employee hasn't driven any workflow or agent runs yet. Bind a trigger to see replays here.
triggerDescription: Manage IM commands / scheduled task triggers dispatched to this employee. FE-authored triggers (createdVia=manual) can be edited or deleted freely; DAG-generated triggers are read-only.
error.loadRuns: Failed to load employee run history
